summary: Analyzed 24 sampled frames. Average frame difference: 3.42%. Strongest visual changes near frames: 25, 50, 75, 88. Found 2 potential issue(s): 0 high, 2 medium severity.

issues.note: Frame-to-frame differences are very uniform (stddev: 0.312%). Motion may lack ease-in/ease-out or acceleration changes.
Abrupt visual change between frames 49→50 (diff: 12.85% vs avg 3.42%). Could be a scene cut, pop, or missing in-between.

confidence_notes: Analysis is based on pixel-level frame differences and brightness only.
This does NOT evaluate animation principles like timing, spacing, arcs, or weight.
Future versions will add pose estimation and motion-path analysis for deeper critique.
